name: Portable Battery Socket
descs:
Turn Start: Two random allies gain +2 [Charge] Count. (Prioritizes Identities with Skills that gain [Charge] Count or 'Unique Charge')

When activating Sloth Absolute Resonance, one random ally gains +3 [Charge] Count at Combat Start.

Turn Start: two random allies gain +3 [Charge] Count. (Prioritizes Identities with Skills that gain [Charge] Count or 'Unique Charge')

When activating Sloth Resonance, one random ally gains +3 [Charge] Count at Combat Start.

Turn Start: three random allies gain +3 [Charge] Count. (Prioritizes Identities with Skills that gain [Charge] Count or 'Unique Charge')

When activating Sloth Resonance, one random ally gains +5 [Charge] Count at Combat Start.
